problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Topological insulator surface state conduction may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
